zh.Estouteville-Écalles, Normandy, France: 法國諾門迪瑟-馬利艾斯陶迪維爾-艾卡利斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Burga Stuteville於1123年出生在英國越可爾可廷加姆時，她的父親Robert de Stuteville III48歲，母親Erneburge FitzBaldric Lady of Skipwith44歲。她與William Pantulf結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。她去世於1166年之後。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Burga Stuteville于1123年出生在英国越可爾可廷加姆时，她的父亲Robert de Stuteville III48岁，母亲Erneburge FitzBaldric Lady of Skipwith44岁。她与William Pantulf结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。她去世于1166年之后。

nameMeanings.name: Stuteville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Estouteville or Etoutteville in Seine-Maritime.

nameMeanings.name: Burga
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: ‘inaccessible’, an epithet of the wife of Shiva, because of her propensity for prolonged meditation. Durga represents her terrifying form, reflecting her anger when disturbed.

en.lifeSummary: When Burga Stuteville was born in 1123, in Cottingham, Yorkshire, England, her father, Robert de Stuteville III, was 48 and her mother, Erneburge FitzBaldric Lady of Skipwith, was 44. She married William Pantulf. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. She died after 1166.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Burga Stuteville est née en 1123, à Cottingham, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Stuteville III, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Erneburge FitzBaldric Lady of Skipwith, avait 44 ans. Elle a épousé William Pantulf. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Elle est décédée après 1166.

ja.lifeSummary: Burga Stutevilleが1123年にイギリスヨークシュアイアコッティンガムで生まれた時，父Robert de Stuteville IIIは48歳，母Erneburge FitzBaldric Lady of Skipwithは44歳であった。William Pantulfと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼女は1166年以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Burga Stuteville(이)가 1123년 영국 요르크실르 컷잉함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Stuteville III(은)는 48세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Erneburge FitzBaldric Lady of Skipwith(은)는 44세였다. 그녀는 William Pantulf(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1166년 이후 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Burga Stuteville nasceu em 1123, em Cottingham, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Stuteville III, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Erneburge FitzBaldric Lady of Skipwith, tinha 44 anos. Ela casou-se com William Pantulf. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ela faleceu após 1166.

ru.Breedon on the Hill, Leicestershire, Eng: бридон он т хилл, лисестиршир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Burga Stuteville родилась в 1123 г. в местности коттингхам, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert de Stuteville III было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Erneburge FitzBaldric Lady of Skipwith, 44. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Pantulf. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Она умерла после 1166 г.
